title: cyperus squarrosulus
intro: Cyperus squarrosulus, also known as the spiny flatsedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cyperus squarrosulus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to aid in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and ointments, and its leaves and rhizomes are used to make medicinal teas and topical creams.
